# ReceiptHub

> Personal invoice/receipt manager PWA for a New Zealand user. Local-first (IndexedDB) with sync to a private GitHub repo via Contents API. AI field extraction via Gemini 2.5 Flash free tier, called directly from the browser. Bilingual (zh/en), dual theme, NZ GST aware (total × 3/23). Zero backend, $0/month.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/WilsonZheng/ReceiptHub/blob/main/README.md): features, setup, architecture
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/WilsonZheng/ReceiptHub/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): canonical engineering knowledge base — conventions, sync protocol, hard-won iOS PWA pitfalls
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/WilsonZheng/ReceiptHub/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI agent quickstart and hard rules

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/WilsonZheng/ReceiptHub)
- App data lives in a separate private repository; this site contains no user data without the owner's access token.
